_comment: First-run task seed for the dashboard. On a fresh browser (empty local storage) the dashboard hydrates its Tasks list from this file, so an AI can write real tasks here and the user sees them without touching the UI. Shape: schemas/tasks.schema.json (id/status/notionId/updatedAt are filled in on load). Demo persona: Alex Rivera.
